response.text:

rationale: Your SoC is 0.25, which is 0.30 below our minimum sharing threshold of 0.55; accepting would compromise our self-preservation in an islanded, declining-SoC scenario where geographic stress is widespread.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
